abstract: An option for selecting the scale factor of the shape relative to the local coordinate space of the node containing it.
overview:
## Discussion

The value for this key is an [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSValue] object containing an [doc://com.apple.scenekit/documentation/SceneKit/SCNVector3] structure, whose components describe the scale factor in each of the x-, y- and z-axis directions. The default value is the vector `{1.0, 1.0, 1.0}`, specifying no change of scale.

SceneKit’s physics simulation ignores the [doc://com.apple.scenekit/documentation/SceneKit/SCNNode/scale] property of nodes containing physics bodies when simulating collisions. Instead, use this option to provide a scale factor when creating custom physics shapes. (If you create a physics body for a node without specifying a custom shape, SceneKit uses the node’s [doc://com.apple.scenekit/documentation/SceneKit/SCNNode/scale] property to infer this scale factor at creation time.)

# scale

**Type Property**

An option for selecting the scale factor of the shape relative to the local coordinate space of the node containing it.

## Declaration

```swift
static let scale: SCNPhysicsShape.Option
```

## Discussion

The value for this key is an [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSValue] object containing an [doc://com.apple.scenekit/documentation/SceneKit/SCNVector3] structure, whose components describe the scale factor in each of the x-, y- and z-axis directions. The default value is the vector `{1.0, 1.0, 1.0}`, specifying no change of scale.

SceneKit’s physics simulation ignores the [doc://com.apple.scenekit/documentation/SceneKit/SCNNode/scale] property of nodes containing physics bodies when simulating collisions. Instead, use this option to provide a scale factor when creating custom physics shapes. (If you create a physics body for a node without specifying a custom shape, SceneKit uses the node’s [doc://com.apple.scenekit/documentation/SceneKit/SCNNode/scale] property to infer this scale factor at creation time.)

## Type Properties

- **collisionMargin**
- **keepAsCompound**: An option for selecting whether to create a group of independent shapes or combine them into a single shape.
- **type**: An option for selecting the level of detail at which to create shapes from geometry.
- **SCNPhysicsShape.ShapeType**: Values for the [doc://com.apple.scenekit/documentation/SceneKit/SCNPhysicsShape/Option/type] key specifying the level of detail that SceneKit uses when creating a physics shape based on a geometry.
